content.text:
Based on the zoomed-in view of atom 31 (Oxygen), I can see it is covalently connected to:

**Neighbour atoms of atom 31 (O):**
- Atom index **30**, element **N** (Nitrogen)

**geomconf_index:** 8378

The oxygen atom (O:31) appears to have only one covalent bond, connecting it to the nitrogen atom (N:30). This is consistent with a nitro group (-NO₂) structure where the oxygen is double-bonded to nitrogen.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 31 (element: O). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
